big_problem: Launch-10 Lab panels need in-product OG export links so every screenshot-worthy panel travels like Explore and Bureau cards (DEPTH Lab L5).
epic: Lab L5 — launch-10 OG export link parity
slice_title: OG export links on buy-sell and dashboard renderers
parity_ref: Lab L5 OG card per panel matches in-product export
acceptance_commands: npm run start --workspace=apps/web & sleep 8 && curl -s -o /tmp/og-buysell.png -w '%{http_code} %{size_download}\n' 'http://localhost:3000/og/buysell?download=1' && curl -s -o /tmp/og-dashboard.png -w '%{http_code} %{size_download}\n' 'http://localhost:3000/og/dashboard?download=1'
